message.content:
Explore the iskrib mobile app codebase at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app. I need to understand:

1. The full directory structure under `apps/mobile/src/`
2. The contents of key files:
   - `apps/mobile/src/navigation/types.ts` (navigation types)
   - `apps/mobile/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx` (navigator setup)
   - `apps/mobile/src/lib/api/apiClient.ts` (API client pattern)
   - `apps/mobile/src/lib/api/mobileApi.ts` (existing API functions)
   - Any existing `socialApi.ts` if it exists
3. The pattern used in existing screens - read a couple examples:
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/ProfileScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/VisitProfileScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/ProfileTabBar.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/ProfileWritingsTab.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/ProfileHeroSection.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Home/HomeFeedScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Home/PostDetailScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Home/ExploreScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Editor/JournalEditorScreen.tsx`
   - `apps/mobile/src/screens/Profile/EditProfileScreen.tsx`
4. Any existing hooks in `src/hooks/`
5. Any existing components in `src/components/`

Read ALL these files completely. Return their full contents so I can understand patterns.

content.text: I'll explore the iskrib mobile app codebase systematically. Let me start by examining the directory structure and then reading the key files you've specified.
